---
title: "About"
---

## About Me

I am a data science professional focused on designing thoughtful analytical solutions, building scalable workflows, and turning complex information into business-ready stories. My approach is precise, visually polished, and aligned with the requirements of modern teams.

## My focus areas

- Data engineering and pipeline automation
- Predictive modeling and forecasting
- Interactive dashboards and visualization
- Statistical analysis and experimental design

## Why this portfolio

This website is designed to present my work with a clean, high-end feel. The white and soft pink palette keeps the layout professional while supporting a calm, approachable aesthetic.

## Let's connect

Visit my GitHub to explore repositories, or reach out directly if you would like to discuss analytics, machine learning, or data-driven strategy for your next opportunity.
